svg.title: Model architecture across all Run 6 ablation groups
svg.desc: Unified architecture showing shared backbone and variation points for Groups A (input), A+ (feature enrichment), B (temporal window), B+ (pooling), C (shuttle fusion), and D (classifier head).
svg.text: Group A+ — feature enrichment (applied on top of A winner)
A7: bones only (2-dim, replaces joint XY)
A9: A winner + bbox norm (same dims)
Group B+ — pooling strategy (three variants vs. B1 mean-pool baseline)
Group C — shuttle fusion (three variants + C4 reference run)
